paper.title_en: Electromagnetic Emission from a Black Hole Evaporating in External Magnetic Field
paper.abstract_en: We describe a classical (non-quantum) radiation process: additional (to Hawking) emission by a black hole evaporating in an external magnetic field in vacuum. The electromagnetic radiation process is completely electric charge-free and bears some resemblance to the Gertsenshtein-Zel'dovich effect. The time evolution of the spacetime metric perturbs a static background magnetic field, inducing a radiative field that acts as an effective electromagnetic source even in the absence of physical charges or currents. To isolate the dynamic effects of the time-dependent spacetime on the external magnetic field, we approximate Hawking radiation as a spherically symmetric outflow of null fluid governed by the prescribed time-dependence of the central mass $M(t)$. We employ Laplace transform, which selects the retarded outgoing branch of the electromagnetic response, producing fields proportional to $Θ(t-r)$ and thereby fixing a causal radiative arrow of emission. The emitted spectral energy is red-dominated, scaling as $d\mathcal{E}_B/dω\propto B_0^2 m_0^2 τ_H^{-2/3} ω^{-8/3}$, where $τ_H$ is the Hawking evaporation timescale, and corresponds to a pure Transverse Electric (TE) mode. There is no final bright burst at the end of the evaporation. We offer classical analogues for this mechanism as transmission-line emission and, separately, as the displacement current emission from a medium with time-varying dielectric permittivity.

decision.selection_reason_zh: 该论文研究黑洞蒸发过程中外磁场导致的经典电磁辐射，属于黑洞热力学相关主题，理论深度和严谨性较高，新颖性较好。
decision.title_zh: 黑洞在外磁场中蒸发的电磁辐射
decision.abstract_zh: 我们描述了一个经典（非量子）辐射过程：在真空中外磁场中蒸发的黑洞的额外（霍金辐射之外的）发射。该电磁辐射过程完全不带电荷，并与Gertsenshtein-Zel'dovich效应有一些相似之处。时空度规的时间演化扰动静态背景磁场，诱导出一个辐射场，即使在不存在物理电荷或电流的情况下也作为有效电磁源。为了隔离时变时空对外磁场的动态效应，我们将霍金辐射近似为一个由中心质量$M(t)$的预定时间依赖性支配的零流体球对称流出。我们采用拉普拉斯变换，它选择电磁响应的延迟出射分支，产生与$Θ(t-r)$成比例的场，从而固定了发射的因果辐射箭头。发射的谱能量以红色为主，标度为$d\mathcal{E}_B/dω\propto B_0^2 m_0^2 τ_H^{-2/3} ω^{-8/3}$，其中$τ_H$是霍金蒸发时间尺度，并且对应于纯横电（TE）模式。在蒸发结束时没有明亮的最终爆发。我们为这一机制提供了经典类比：传输线发射，以及分别作为具有时变介电常数的介质中的位移电流发射。
